Title: de Ridder, André
Overview: Greek art scholar; social history; de Ridder may only be a social historian, and Deonna may be art historian
Selected Bibliography: and Deonna, Waldemar. L'art en Grece. Paris: Renaissance du Livre, 1924. Art in Greece. Translated by V. C. C. Collum. New York: Knopf, 1927.
